channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts

item.title: 🔥 Bitcoin eyes a $75K breakout as $71K neutral momentum tightens—can a rise above $73,175 spark April fire? https://Blockchain.News/news/20260325-price-prediction-btc-targets-75000-by-april-2026-amid #BTC #Bitcoin #Crypto

item.title: Copilot now edits existing PRs when @mention’d—no new PRs, faster fixes. 🔧 https://Blockchain.News/news/github-copilot-pull-request-direct-edits #AI #GitHub #CodeReview

item.title: BNB holders stack rewards like a cheat code. 177% in 15 months, with 11.8% monthly from Launchpool + airdrops. 🔥 https://Blockchain.News/news/bnb-holders-earned-177-percent-returns-binance-rewards-stack #BNB #crypto #yield
